ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "transaction_date" REAL /* Date of the transaction */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the property */,
  "distance_to_metro" REAL /* Distance from the nearest metro station (km) */,
  "num_convenience_stores" INTEGER /* Number of convenience stores nearby */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., apartment, house, commercial) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning information of the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the agent's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Agent's area of specialization (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" REAL /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., buyer, seller, tenant) */,
  "preferred_neighborhoods" TEXT /* List of preferred neighborhoods */,
  "preferred_property_types" TEXT /* List of preferred property types */,
  "budget" REAL /* Client's budget for property purchases or leases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the lead */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the lead */,
  "lead_date" REAL /* Date of the lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., referral, advertisement) */,
  "follow_up_date" REAL /* Next follow-up date for the lead */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the lead (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., convenience store, metro station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property to the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend (e.g., increasing prices, decreasing demand) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" REAL /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" REAL /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., price, demand, supply) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the market (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., quarterly report, annual report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" REAL /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual, special) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "average_property_price" REAL /* Average property price in the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "tour_url" TEXT /* URL of the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_tours_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
